revisedPrompt: Create a single raster PNG logo-brand game UI icon for an "Open Dungeon" right sidebar Chats category. Centered aged parchment scroll with a small ink quill, dungeon-era fantasy tabletop feel. Chunky hand-painted RPG app icon style, crisp readable silhouette at small sizes, no text or symbols. Square icon composition with generous padding and a simple dark stone vignette background. Amber torchlit highlights, charcoal stone shadows, premium polished game UI finish, matching the vibe of a dark stone dungeon door icon. Constraints: no letters, no words, no watermark, no full scene, no modern objects.
prompt:
Use case: logo-brand
Asset type: Open Dungeon right sidebar category icon
Primary request: Chats category icon: an aged parchment scroll with a small ink quill, dungeon-era fantasy tabletop feel, warm torchlit highlights, chunky hand-painted RPG app icon style, matching a dark stone dungeon door icon vibe.
Style/medium: painterly game UI icon, crisp silhouette, readable at small size, no text.
Composition/framing: centered single object, square icon, generous padding, simple dark stone vignette.
Lighting/mood: amber torch glow, charcoal stone shadows, premium game UI polish.
Constraints: no letters, no words, no watermark, no full scene, no modern objects.
